key.name: sensitive-patterns
key.description: List of patterns to match against the full browser window title. Case-insensitive. Use specific strings like 'App Dashboard' or 'admin.example.com' to avoid false positives. Locked down via dconf in production.

key.name: ignore-patterns
key.description: If the window title contains any of these patterns, skip it even if a sensitive pattern matches. Case-insensitive. Used to filter out search engine results pages.

key.name: log-path
key.description: Path to the JSON log file for SIEM ingestion. If empty, defaults to ~/.local/share/sensitive-ss/events.log

key.name: warning-duration
key.description: How long the topbar warning is displayed before auto-dismissing.
